filtered_highest_profile_label: Among profiles with {filter_field_label} = "{filter_field_value}", which profile has the highest {field_label} value?
Filter to cards where {filter_field_label} is "{filter_field_value}". Which profile has the largest {field_label}?
Within the {filter_field_label} "{filter_field_value}" group, what profile name has the maximum {field_label} value?
Considering only profiles with {filter_field_label}: "{filter_field_value}", which profile ranks highest by {field_label}?
Which visible profile in the {filter_field_label} = "{filter_field_value}" group has the greatest {field_label}?
filtered_lowest_profile_label: Among profiles with {filter_field_label} = "{filter_field_value}", which profile has the lowest {field_label} value?
Filter to cards where {filter_field_label} is "{filter_field_value}". Which profile has the smallest {field_label}?
Within the {filter_field_label} "{filter_field_value}" group, what profile name has the minimum {field_label} value?
Considering only profiles with {filter_field_label}: "{filter_field_value}", which profile ranks lowest by {field_label}?
Which visible profile in the {filter_field_label} = "{filter_field_value}" group has the least {field_label}?
filtered_nth_highest_profile_label: Among profiles with {filter_field_label} = "{filter_field_value}", which profile has the {rank_ordinal} highest {field_label} value?
Filter to cards where {filter_field_label} is "{filter_field_value}" and sort by {field_label} from highest to lowest. Which profile is {rank_ordinal}?
Within the {filter_field_label} "{filter_field_value}" group, what profile name is {rank_ordinal} by descending {field_label}?
Considering only profiles with {filter_field_label}: "{filter_field_value}", which profile is {rank_ordinal} when ordered by highest {field_label}?
Find the {rank_ordinal} largest {field_label} value among profiles with {filter_field_label} = "{filter_field_value}". What profile name is on that card?
filtered_nth_lowest_profile_label: Among profiles with {filter_field_label} = "{filter_field_value}", which profile has the {rank_ordinal} lowest {field_label} value?
Filter to cards where {filter_field_label} is "{filter_field_value}" and sort by {field_label} from lowest to highest. Which profile is {rank_ordinal}?
Within the {filter_field_label} "{filter_field_value}" group, what profile name is {rank_ordinal} by ascending {field_label}?
Considering only profiles with {filter_field_label}: "{filter_field_value}", which profile is {rank_ordinal} when ordered by lowest {field_label}?
Find the {rank_ordinal} smallest {field_label} value among profiles with {filter_field_label} = "{filter_field_value}". What profile name is on that card?
highest_field_profile_label: Which profile has the highest {field_label} value?
Find the card with the largest {field_label} value. What profile name is shown?
What profile name corresponds to the maximum {field_label} value?
Among all visible cards, which profile has the greatest {field_label}?
Which visible profile ranks highest by {field_label}?
lowest_field_profile_label: Which profile has the lowest {field_label} value?
Find the card with the smallest {field_label} value. What profile name is shown?
What profile name corresponds to the minimum {field_label} value?
Among all visible cards, which profile has the least {field_label}?
Which visible profile ranks lowest by {field_label}?
nth_highest_field_profile_label: Which profile has the {rank_ordinal} highest {field_label} value?
Sort the profiles by {field_label} from highest to lowest. Which profile is {rank_ordinal}?
After ranking by descending {field_label}, what profile name is in {rank_ordinal} place?
Which visible profile is {rank_ordinal} when ordered by highest {field_label}?
Find the {rank_ordinal} largest {field_label} value. What profile name is on that card?
nth_lowest_field_profile_label: Which profile has the {rank_ordinal} lowest {field_label} value?
Sort the profiles by {field_label} from lowest to highest. Which profile is {rank_ordinal}?
After ranking by ascending {field_label}, what profile name is in {rank_ordinal} place?
Which visible profile is {rank_ordinal} when ordered by lowest {field_label}?
Find the {rank_ordinal} smallest {field_label} value. What profile name is on that card?

global.json_output_contract: Return a JSON object with "annotation" and "answer".
global.json_output_contract_answer_only: Return a JSON object with "answer" only.

scene:profile_card_grid.object_description: a grid of profile cards, each with a visible profile name and labeled fields

query:filtered_highest_profile_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible profile name
query:filtered_highest_profile_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the [x0, y0, x1, y1] box around the selected profile card in image pixel coordinates

query:filtered_lowest_profile_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible profile name
query:filtered_lowest_profile_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the [x0, y0, x1, y1] box around the selected profile card in image pixel coordinates
